hero-open.title: Welcome to DeckyDeckDecks.com
hero-open.subtitle: A deck about a site about decks about decks. You're three layers deep. There's no going back.

the-situation.title: Let's Assess the Situation
the-situation.body: You typed deckydeckdecks.com into a browser. Three 'deck's. You did this on purpose. That tells us something about you.
bullets: You either mistyped deckydecks.com (understandable)
Or you suspected there might be something here (concerning)
Or someone sent you this link (you have interesting friends)
Either way, you're here now. Among us.

branch-why.title: Why Are You Here?
branch-why.subtitle: Be honest. This is a safe space. (It's also a deck.)

branches.label: I typed too many deck's
branches.desc: Honest. Respectable. We'll get you where you need to go.

branches.label: I knew this would exist
branches.desc: You understand the internet. And recursion. And us.

branches.label: Someone sent me this
branches.desc: Your friend is either brilliant or unhinged. Possibly both.

typo-path.title: An Honest Mistake
typo-path.body: Look, we get it. DeckyDecks already has two 'deck's in it. Adding a third is just muscle memory gone rogue.
bullets: Your fingers betrayed you
But your subconscious knew what it was doing
The third 'deck' was inside you all along
And now you're watching a presentation about it

believer-path.title: You Absolute Legend
believer-path.body: You knew someone would buy this domain. You knew it would be a deck. Because what else would it be? A normal website? Please.
bullets: Of course it's a deck. Everything is a deck.
The landing page? Deck.
The feedback system? Also a deck.
This domain justification? You guessed it.

believer-depth.title: Meta Depth vs. Domain Cost Justification

sent-path.title: About Your Friend
sent-path.body: The person who sent you this link is trying to tell you something. They want you to know that presentations can be recursive, that domains can be jokes, and that you belong here.
bullets: They found the third layer and thought of you
That's either a compliment or an intervention
We choose to believe it's a compliment
Welcome to the community of people who get it

sent-one-of-us.title: One of Us
sent-one-of-us.subtitle: One of us. One of us. One of us.

convergence-realization.title: The Realization
convergence-realization.body: However you got here, you've now spent real human minutes watching a presentation on a joke domain about a presentation tool that makes presentations about presentations.
bullets: Time you will never get back
But time you wouldn't trade either
Because this is genuinely more fun than whatever you were doing
And deep down, you want to make one of these yourself

branch-now-what.title: So Now What?
branch-now-what.subtitle: You've seen the third layer. The question is: what do you do with this knowledge?

branches.label: Take me to the real thing
branches.desc: DeckyDecks.com — where you can actually make decks

branches.label: Go deeper
branches.desc: Is there a deckydeckdeckdecks.com? (There isn't. Yet.)

branches.label: I just want to vibe here
branches.desc: Stay in the meta. We respect it.

redirect-go.title: Welcome to DeckyDecks
bullets: Create branching, interactive presentations
AI-generated decks from any content
Share with a link, get feedback as a deck
Everything is a deck. Now you know.

deeper.title: The Fourth Layer
deeper.body:
deckydeckdeckdecks.com is not registered. Yet.

But let's be real — if you're reading this, someone is already thinking about buying it. The recursion wants to continue. The turtles demand it.
bullets: Layer 4: A deck about this deck about decks about decks
Layer 5: At this point it's just domain squatting with style
Layer 6: The DNS system files a restraining order
Layer 7: We achieve presentation singularity

deeper-choice.title: Satisfied?
deeper-choice.subtitle: The void has been stared into. It stared back. In JSON.

branches.label: Let me vibe
branches.desc: I'm not ready to leave the third layer

vibe-zone.title: How Meta Do You Feel Right Now?
vibe-zone.subtitle: Take a moment. Breathe. You're inside a deck inside a joke inside the internet.

vibe-ranking.title: Rank These Truths
vibe-ranking.subtitle: Drag to reorder by how much they resonate with your soul.
items: The real presentation was the friends we made
JSON is a lifestyle, not a format
Three deck's is the correct number of deck's

vibe-finale.title: One of Us
vibe-finale.subtitle: You made it to the end of the third layer. You ranked truths about recursion. You are irreversibly one of us.

final-redirect.title: Now Go Make Something
final-redirect.body:
You've earned your stripes. You've seen the turtles. Now it's time to create your own recursive nightmare.

Enter DeckyDecks.com →
bullets: Make a deck
Make a deck about your deck
Share it with someone who will appreciate the recursion
Buy deckydeckdeckdeckdecks.com (don't actually)
